data.title: Fitt’s Law
data.description: Optimized button sizes and positions to reduce navigation time.
data.technical_spec: Edge pressure zones and frequent interactive elements positioned for ease.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimal options presented at any point to reduce decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Simplified interface with grouped options and progressive disclosure.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A clean, minimalist aesthetic enhances user perception of usability.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design principles and high contrast for readability.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligned with user expectations by reflecting common web conventions.
data.technical_spec: Consistent interface structures and recognizable icons.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together for intuitive navigation.
